mapper.update: UPDATE student SET name = #{name},no = #{no},gender = #{gender},phone = #{phone},id_card = #{idCard},is_college = #{isCollege},address = #{address},degree = #{degree}, graduation_date = #{graduationDate},clazz_id = #{clazzId} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE student SET violation_count = #{violationCount},violation_score = #{violationScore} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE student SET update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM student WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT violation_count AS count,violation_score AS score FROM student WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT (CASE WHEN clazz_id = 1 THEN 'JavaEE就业163期' WHEN clazz_id = 2 THEN '前端就业90期' WHEN clazz_id = 3 THEN 'JavaEE就业165期' WHEN clazz_id = 4 THEN 'JavaEE就业166期' WHEN clazz_id = 5 THEN '大数据就业58期' WHEN clazz_id = 6 THEN 'JavaEE就业167期' WHEN clazz_id = 7 THEN '中华人民共和国国史001期' ELSE '其他' END )AS pos, COUNT(*) AS num FROM student GROUP BY clazz_id;
SELECT (CASE degree WHEN 1 THEN '初中' WHEN 2 THEN '高中' WHEN 3 THEN '大专' WHEN 4 THEN '本科' WHEN 5 THEN '硕士' WHEN 6 THEN '博士' ELSE '其他' END )AS name,COUNT(*) AS value FROM student GROUP BY degree;
